GST-001.title: Airbnb Welcome Book Template | Editable Excel + PDF | STR Host Guest Guide | Vacation Rental Welcome Packet | Instant Download
GST-001.description:
Business-grade Airbnb welcome book template for VRBO and short-term rental hosts. Editable Excel + PDF with 9 pre-formatted sections. Instant download.

Every great stay starts with a great welcome. This isn't another cutesy template —
it's the welcome book we built for our own short-term rentals after years of
watching guests miss the wifi password, wreck the hot tub, and call us at
11pm asking about trash day.

═══════════════════════════════════════════
WHAT'S INCLUDED
═══════════════════════════════════════════

✨ TWO XLSX FILES IN THE SAME DOWNLOAD:
   • DEMO — fully filled sample property to explore the tool
   • BLANK — cleared starter for your actual property
✨ Built-in recording-device disclosure — meets Airbnb's Host Standards
   out of the box, no separate paperwork.
✨ Fire safety + evacuation guidance section, because the welcome book
   is the last thing guests read before something goes wrong.
✨ Magazine-quality PDF rendered in your browser — 3 themes (Magazine / Editorial / Hotel) × 4 palettes
✨ Logo upload — drop your property's PNG or SVG, it appears on every page
✨ Tap-to-action QR codes — guests scan to auto-join WiFi, tap-to-call, or open Maps
✨ Works fully offline — no account, no subscription, no data leaves your machine
✨ BONUS: Pre-written Airbnb listing copy (House Rules, Check-in,
   Checkout reminder) — paste into your Airbnb listing, copy-ready.
✨ SAMPLE OUTPUT PDF shipped in the download so you know exactly
   what you're buying before opening the renderer.

📘 Fully editable Excel workbook + matching PDF
📘 Multi-section guest guide covering:
   • Arrival + check-in instructions
   • WiFi + tech (smart lock codes, remote pairings, streaming logins)
   • House rules (your custom rules, not generic)
   • Local recommendations (restaurants, coffee, groceries, emergencies)
   • Quiet hours + noise policy
   • Pet policy (if applicable)
   • Trash + recycling schedule
   • Departure checklist
   • Safety & disclosures (recording devices, fire safety, evacuation)
   • Emergency contacts
📘 Pre-formatted so you just swap your info — no Word wrestling
📘 Print-ready layout or digital delivery (QR code version included)
📘 Bonus: companion "Host's Reference Sheet" for you (not the guest)
📘 Free lifetime updates when we improve the template

═══════════════════════════════════════════
WHY THIS INSTEAD OF THE 1,000 OTHER WELCOME BOOKS ON ETSY
═══════════════════════════════════════════

Most welcome books are pretty and thin. This one is pretty AND covers the
operational details that actually prevent 11pm phone calls:
   ✅ Guest-friendly layout with actual branded design
   ✅ Sections ordered by when guests need them (arrival → stay → departure)
   ✅ Edit-in-place — no "find and replace" across 12 pages
   ✅ Works whether you print it, frame it, or leave it as a QR code on the counter

═══════════════════════════════════════════
WHO THIS IS FOR
═══════════════════════════════════════════

🏡 Airbnb hosts with 1 to 10 properties
🏡 VRBO, Furnished Finder, and direct-booking hosts
🏡 Property managers setting up new listings
🏡 Anyone whose current welcome book is a printed Google Doc

═══════════════════════════════════════════
HOW IT WORKS
═══════════════════════════════════════════

1️⃣ Purchase → instant download, Excel + PDF in your inbox in 60 seconds
2️⃣ Open in Excel 2016 or later (Windows/Mac), Excel 365, or Google Sheets
3️⃣ Edit text cells with your property's info (fully editable, no locked cells)
4️⃣ Print, frame, or share digitally via QR code
5️⃣ Update anytime — it's your file

═══════════════════════════════════════════
FILE COMPATIBILITY
═══════════════════════════════════════════

✅ Microsoft Excel 2016+ (Windows and Mac)
✅ Microsoft Excel 365
✅ Google Sheets (import via File > Import)
❌ Apple Numbers — not tested, message first if this is your only option

REFUNDS + SUPPORT
═══════════════════════════════════════════

14-day refund, no questions asked. If you can't open the file or it doesn't
work for your setup, message us — we'll fix it.

ABOUT The STR Ledger

OPS-001.title: Airbnb Cleaner Turnover Checklist & Scorecard | Excel + Printable PDF | STR Host Cleaning Tracker | Vacation Rental Cleaning
OPS-001.description:
Turnover chaos has a spreadsheet. Printable cleaner turnover checklist + rolling scorecard for Airbnb and STR hosts. 40 items across 8 zones. Excel + PDF.

Stop texting your cleaner at 11pm.
This is the checklist we built for our own properties after watching
guests arrive to empty coffee pods, streaky mirrors, and hot tubs with
cloudy water.

═══════════════════════════════════════════
WHAT'S INCLUDED
═══════════════════════════════════════════

📋 1-PAGE PRINTABLE CHECKLIST — 40 items across 8 zones:
   • Bedroom (6) · Bathroom (7) · Kitchen (8) · Living (5)
   • Outdoor (4) · Supplies (4) · Safety (3) · Final Walk (3)
   Cleaner checks each item, initials, signs, dates. You get the paper back.

📊 ROLLING SCORECARD DASHBOARD — the host-facing payoff:
   • Avg score per cleaner across every turnover
   • Issue rate % (how often guest complaints follow their turnovers)
   • Automatic ranking — who's your #1 cleaner?
   • Conditional formatting flags anyone below 33/40

📝 TURNOVER LOG — 500-row capacity, dropdowns for property + cleaner
📇 CLEANER ROSTER — contact info + pay rate + start date for every cleaner
📦 SUPPLY PAR LEVELS — bonus: per-property stock targets so nothing runs out

═══════════════════════════════════════════
WHY THIS INSTEAD OF A STICKY NOTE
═══════════════════════════════════════════

Most hosts track cleaners by vibes. This tool gives you actual data:
   ✅ Who's your best cleaner? (Rank column tells you)
   ✅ Who has the highest complaint rate? (Issue % tells you)
   ✅ Which cleaner takes longest per turnover? (Minutes column tells you)
   ✅ Which property is hardest to turn? (Sort log by minutes — you'll see)

The conversation with a struggling cleaner is easier when you have 10 data
points, not a "vibe."

═══════════════════════════════════════════
WHO THIS IS FOR
═══════════════════════════════════════════

🏡 Airbnb hosts with 1+ properties who use outside cleaners
🏡 Semi-pro operators juggling 3-10 properties
🏡 Property managers tracking a cleaner roster
🏡 Anyone whose current system is "text the cleaner and hope"

═══════════════════════════════════════════
HOW IT WORKS
═══════════════════════════════════════════

1️⃣ Purchase → instant download
2️⃣ 5-minute setup: replace sample cleaners + properties with yours
3️⃣ Print the checklist for every turnover — hand to cleaner
4️⃣ After each turnover, log it (takes 60 seconds)
5️⃣ Scorecard updates automatically

FILE COMPATIBILITY

TAX-001.title: Airbnb Mileage Log Spreadsheet | IRS Compliant STR Mileage Tracker | Excel + Google Sheets | Vacation Rental Tax Deduction
TAX-001.description:
Close your year before April does. IRS-compliant mileage log for Airbnb and STR hosts. Auto-calculates deduction at 2026 IRS rate ($0.70/mi). Editable Excel.

The IRS requires four things per business-mile entry: date, destination, business purpose, and miles. Most STR hosts have none of it at tax time. Active hosts miss $2,000–$8,000 per year in mileage deductions — not because they didn't drive, but because they didn't document.

This log captures all four fields plus odometer readings, property allocation, and auto-calculated dollar deduction at the current IRS standard mileage rate. Hand the monthly summary and YTD dashboard to your CPA. Done.

═══════════════════════════════════════════
WHAT'S INCLUDED
═══════════════════════════════════════════

Excel workbook (5 tabs):

- Mileage Log — one row per trip. Date, property, destination, business purpose, start/end odometer OR typed miles, notes. 2,000-row capacity.
- Monthly Summary — miles + dollar deduction per month, auto-calculated from the log
- YTD Dashboard — totals + breakdown by business purpose (7 categories: property inspection, turnover, supplies run, guest transport, repairs, meeting cleaner, other)
- Welcome tab — IRS compliance note + how-to guide
- Settings tab — editable IRS rate (update every January 1), property list, purpose list (source for all dropdowns)

Compliance check column (col K): green ✓ when a row meets IRS Pub 463 requirements, red ⚠ when something required is missing.

Formula auto-detects odometer method (start + end odo) OR stated-miles method (typed). Use whichever you prefer.

═══════════════════════════════════════════
WHY THIS PAYS FOR ITSELF IN ONE TRIP
═══════════════════════════════════════════

25 miles round-trip × $0.70/mi = $17.50 deduction.

This template pays for itself on one trip. Active STR hosts who document consistently recover $2,000–$8,000 per year. At a 25% tax bracket, every 100 documented miles is $17.50 back in your pocket.

The IRS does not accept "I think I drove a lot." They want a log. This is the log.

═══════════════════════════════════════════
WHO IT'S FOR
═══════════════════════════════════════════

- STR hosts who drive to their properties for inspections, turnovers, supply runs, repairs, or guest transport
- Multi-property hosts who want per-property mileage allocation
- Hosts filing Schedule C or Schedule E who want an audit-defensible record
- Anyone who told their CPA "I didn't keep a mileage log" and doesn't want to say that again

═══════════════════════════════════════════
HOW IT WORKS
═══════════════════════════════════════════

1. Purchase → instant download
2. Open Settings tab — confirm IRS rate (2026: $0.70/mi), enter your property names
3. Open Mileage Log — fill one row per trip (5 seconds)
4. Column K flags any incomplete rows in red
5. At tax time: print Monthly Summary + YTD Dashboard to PDF, send to CPA

═══════════════════════════════════════════
FILE COMPATIBILITY
═══════════════════════════════════════════

Microsoft Excel 2016+ (Windows and Mac)
Microsoft Excel 365
Google Sheets (imports cleanly)

═══════════════════════════════════════════
REFUNDS + SUPPORT
═══════════════════════════════════════════

14-day refund, no questions asked. If the file doesn't work on your setup or doesn't solve the problem you bought it for, email hello@thestrledger.com — real humans, fast replies.

Not tax advice. Consult your CPA for your specific situation.

═══════════════════════════════════════════
ABOUT THE STR LEDGER
═══════════════════════════════════════════

The STR Ledger builds business-grade Excel systems for hosts who treat their STR portfolio like a real business. Full tax + operations template library at thestrledger.com.

Tax Season Bundle: mileage log + home office deduction + 1099-NEC tracker + Schedule E prep workbook, $147. Details at thestrledger.com/tax-bundle.

This is a digital product. No physical item will be shipped.

TAX-002.title: Schedule E P&L Template for Airbnb Hosts | Built-in Depreciation Calculator | STR Single-Property Tax Tracker
TAX-002.description:
Close your year before April does. Schedule E P&L for Airbnb and STR hosts — IRS line-mapped categories, built-in 27.5-yr depreciation calculator, CPA-ready Excel.

Your CPA hands back your Schedule E draft and says "your categories don't map — I had
to rebuild it." Three hours billable. Or you skip depreciation because the calculator
felt complicated, and leave $10,000+ on the table.

This template fixes both. Every expense category maps directly to a Schedule E line
number. The built-in depreciation tab calculates straight-line residential rental
(27.5 years, mid-month convention) — auto-fills Line 20 for you. Hand the Schedule E
Summary tab to your CPA and they copy your numbers straight into the form.

───────────────────────
WHAT'S INCLUDED
───────────────────────

📋 Property Info
   · Address, purchase price, closing costs, loan terms
   · In-service date, days rented, personal-use days
   · Auto-flags Pub 527's 14-day / 10% personal-use threshold

📋 Revenue Log (1,000-row capacity)
   · Date, guest, channel (Airbnb/VRBO/Booking.com/Direct/Other)
   · Gross + platform fee + cleaning fee collected + net
   · Nights column drives the STR loophole eligibility check

📋 Expense Log (2,000-row capacity)
   · 17 expense categories, all Schedule E line-mapped
   · Dropdown-enforced — no miscategorized rows
   · Date, vendor, category, amount, payment method, receipt flag

📋 Monthly P&L (auto)
   · 12 months × 17 expense categories
   · Net income row with green/red conditional formatting
   · Donut chart: expense composition

📋 Depreciation Calculator (NEW — auto-fills Schedule E Line 20)
   · Straight-line 27.5-yr residential rental, mid-month convention
   · Pulls cost basis from Property Info
   · Land-value input + depreciable basis + annual + current-year amounts
   · Prior-year accumulated override + implied-prior helper

📋 Schedule E Summary (CPA hand-off)
   · IRS Schedule E Part I line totals (Lines 3–26a)
   · Audit-defense block: STR loophole eligibility (IRC §469),
     14-day personal-use test (Pub 527), QBI safe-harbor flag (§199A)
   · Schedule E vs Schedule C routing footnote
   · Print area set — letter portrait, ready to print

───────────────────────
WHY STR HOSTS NEED THIS
───────────────────────

Two problems every single-property host has at tax time:

1. CATEGORY DRIFT — your spreadsheet uses "internet," "Wi-Fi," "comcast,"
   and "ISP" all in different rows. Your CPA sees 200 expense rows
   that don't roll up to Schedule E lines. You pay them to clean it up.

2. SKIPPED DEPRECIATION — the biggest deduction most hosts miss.
   A $400,000 property with $75,000 in land = $11,800/yr in depreciation.
   At a 24% federal bracket, that's $2,832/yr in tax savings you don't
   take because the IRS depreciation rules feel complicated.

This template solves both: enforced Schedule E categories on every
expense row, and a depreciation tab that does the 27.5-year math for you.

───────────────────────
WHO THIS IS FOR
───────────────────────

· Airbnb / VRBO / direct-booking hosts with ONE rental property
· Hosts whose CPA charges by the hour to "clean up" their spreadsheet
· Anyone leaving depreciation off their Schedule E because the math felt scary
· First-year hosts who need to file Schedule E in April
· Side-Hustle Sam (1 listing) and Semi-Pro Sarah's first property

───────────────────────
HOW IT WORKS
───────────────────────

1. Setup (10 min): fill the Property Info tab — purchase, loan,
   in-service date. Most fields auto-pull into the Depreciation tab.
2. Every booking: log a row in the Revenue Log (30 seconds).
3. Every expense: log a row in the Expense Log, pick a category
   from the dropdown (10 seconds).
4. Anytime: open the Monthly P&L for live revenue/expense view.
5. April: print the Schedule E Summary tab. Hand it to your CPA.
   They copy numbers into Schedule E Lines 3–26.

───────────────────────
NEED MORE THAN ONE PROPERTY?
───────────────────────

This is a single-property tracker. If you own multiple rentals, want
asset-by-asset depreciation (furniture 5-yr, appliances 5-yr,
improvements 15-yr) with bonus depreciation, or run multiple LLCs,
upgrade to the Portfolio P&L Master at thestrledger.com/portfolio-master
($97), or save with the Portfolio Bundle ($397).

───────────────────────
FILE COMPATIBILITY
───────────────────────

✅ Microsoft Excel 2016+ (Windows and Mac)
✅ Microsoft Excel 365
✅ Google Sheets

───────────────────────
REFUNDS + SUPPORT
───────────────────────

14-day refund, no questions asked. Email hello@thestrledger.com — we reply fast.

───────────────────────
ABOUT THE STR LEDGER
───────────────────────

Business-grade Excel systems for serious short-term rental hosts.
Full template library at thestrledger.com.

───────────────────────

⚠ Digital product. Not tax advice. Consult your CPA for your specific situation.
   IRS Publication 527 (Residential Rental Property) is the canonical reference
   for Schedule E filers.

TAX-003.title: 1099-NEC Contractor Tracker | Airbnb STR Host Tax Template | $600 Threshold Auto-Flag | Excel Spreadsheet
TAX-003.description:
Close your year before April does. 1099-NEC tracker for Airbnb and STR hosts. Auto-flags the $600 IRS threshold per contractor. Editable Excel.

Pay your cleaner $600 or more in a year? She needs a 1099-NEC from you by January 31.
Pay your handyman across 6 visits — did you hit $600 total? Your landscaper? Your
emergency plumber? Most hosts have no idea who crossed the threshold until their CPA
asks in January — and then spend days piecing it together from Venmo screenshots.

This tracker catches every payment, every contractor, all year — so January is
15 minutes instead of 15 hours.

═══════════════════════════════════════════
WHAT'S INCLUDED
═══════════════════════════════════════════

📋 Contractor Directory (50-capacity)
   · Name, business name, EIN/SSN, full address
   · Email, phone, services provided
   · W-9 on File? (Yes/No dropdown) + W-9 received date

📋 Payment Log (2000-capacity)
   · Date, contractor (dropdown), amount, payment method
   · 7 methods: Venmo, Zelle, Check, Cash, ACH, Credit Card, Other
   · Property tag + description + notes

📋 1099 Prep Dashboard (auto-calculated)
   · YTD paid per contractor — updates as you log payments
   · Auto-flags anyone at or above $600 with YES in red
   · W-9 status per contractor pulled live from Contractor tab
   · Status column: ✓ Ready (green) or ⚠ Need W-9 (yellow)
   · Summary: count of 1099s required, ready, pending W-9, total $ volume

📋 Settings Tab
   · Editable IRS threshold (default $600 — IRS may adjust)
   · Auto tax year
   · IRS Pub 1220 penalty schedule for reference ($60–$660 per form)

═══════════════════════════════════════════
WHY STR HOSTS NEED THIS
═══════════════════════════════════════════

The IRS requires a 1099-NEC for every contractor paid $600+ in a calendar year.
Deadline: January 31. Penalties for missing forms range from $60 to $660 per form
(IRS Publication 1220). You also risk losing the deduction on those payments entirely.

This template auto-flags who crosses $600 in real time — no manual tallying,
no Venmo scroll, no January scramble.

═══════════════════════════════════════════
WHO THIS IS FOR
═══════════════════════════════════════════

· Airbnb and VRBO hosts with cleaning, handyman, or landscaping contractors
· Multi-property STR hosts tracking payments across properties
· Anyone whose CPA asked for their 1099 list last January and they had nothing
· Hosts who pay via Venmo or Zelle and want a clean paper trail

═══════════════════════════════════════════
HOW IT WORKS
═══════════════════════════════════════════

1. Setup (10 min): add your contractors to the Contractors tab
2. Every payment: log one row in the Payment Log (30 seconds)
3. Monthly: open the Dashboard — see who's crossed $600 and whether their W-9 is on file
4. December: chase any missing W-9s before year-end
5. January: hand the Dashboard to your CPA or upload to Track1099 / QuickBooks

═══════════════════════════════════════════
FILE COMPATIBILITY
═══════════════════════════════════════════

✅ Microsoft Excel 2016+ (Windows and Mac)
✅ Microsoft Excel 365
✅ Google Sheets

═══════════════════════════════════════════
REFUNDS + SUPPORT
═══════════════════════════════════════════

14-day refund, no questions asked. Email hello@thestrledger.com — real humans,
fast replies. If the file doesn't work on your setup, we'll make it right.

═══════════════════════════════════════════
ABOUT THE STR LEDGER
═══════════════════════════════════════════

Business-grade Excel systems for serious short-term rental hosts.
Full template library at thestrledger.com.
